scene: 4x3 environment layout sheet — orthographic map, cross-section, and story angles for bluff rim notch, log-bridge over WIDE DEEP flood basin, drowned city river (chunks 03-04). No character identity lock required.

global_style.look: cinematic photorealistic environment concept sheet, film production design
global_style.camera: mixed — diagram panels orthographic/isometric; story panels ARRI Alexa 65 anamorphic 2.39:1 inside cells

palette: warm window lights in drowned city
optional tiny yellow dress silhouette only for scale

global_style.weather: night storm, heavy rain in story panels; diagrams clean readable labels

grid.gutter: thin black lines with small white labels under each cell

panels.label: MAP TOP-DOWN
panels.description: Orthographic top-down map diagram: dark forest band on upper cliff rim; rocky NOTCH where trail ends; fallen trunk line bridging notch from cliff to giant tree; WIDE deep flooded city basin in valley below (not skinny creek slot) with arrow showing river flow through streets; minimal readable labels MAP STYLE not satellite photo

panels.label: CROSS-SECTION
panels.description: Side elevation cross-section: cliff rim with trees on top, long sheer drop, log-bridge trunk at rocky notch spanning to far root tree, FULL submerged building heights and facades in deep floodwater at bottom — water depth 30 feet or more, wide basin not shallow pool

panels.label: STORY FLOW
panels.description: Simple horizontal storyboard strip diagram inside cell: icons or tiny panels — woods → clearing/cliff → city reveal → log-bridge → tree break → fall → above water → underwater → calm; clean infographic style matching teal palette

panels.label: BEAT 1 WOODS
panels.description: Photoreal cinematic: dark storm forest on cliff rim path, heavy rain, deep teal shadows, no city visible, oppressive trees, tiny optional yellow dress silhouette walking away from camera

panels.label: BEAT 2 CLEARING
panels.description: Photoreal: trees thin into moonlit clearing at gorge edge, she stops at cliff lip, rain, sense of height but city not fully visible yet, rim location same as panel 4

panels.label: BEAT 3 CITY REVEAL
panels.description: Photoreal over-shoulder from rim: destroyed flooded city in valley below, huge river through drowned streets, scattered lights in windows, directional rapids and debris, storm rain, she small in foreground silhouette

panels.label: BEAT 4 LOG-BRIDGE
panels.description: Photoreal wide hero geography: massive fallen trunk spans rocky rim NOTCH from cliff to giant standing root tree, storm rain, WIDE DEEP drowned city basin far below with submerged buildings — KEY PANEL — not shallow creek gorge

panels.label: BEAT 5 TREE BREAK
panels.description: Photoreal: lightning strike on rim tree or trunk section, wood splintering, trunk failing under foot point, brief flash only, rain motion, no frozen bolt held across whole frame

panels.label: BEAT 6 FALL
panels.description: Photoreal: woman in yellow dress falling backward toward churning flood river above destroyed city, splinters in air, high angle, dark teal churn not blue pool

panels.label: ABOVE WATER
panels.description: Photoreal wide: surface rapids through urban wreckage, whitecaps, debris trains, storm rain, performance space energy, directional current, deep readable water

panels.label: UNDERWATER
panels.description: Photoreal underwater: murky crushed teal, submerged building silhouettes, bubbles, light rays from surface, sinking dress fabric, not pretty turquoise swimming pool

panels.label: CALM
panels.description: Photoreal: storm easing, softer rain, flood river still high through ruined town but less violent surface, reflective dark water, hopeful dim light break in clouds

must_include: same geographic location across all story panels
orthographic map and cross-section in row 1
flooded destroyed city river not calm forest lake
must_avoid: narrow shallow slot canyon with creek at bottom
persistent lightning bolt wallpaper in every panel
mudslide instead of tree break in panel 8
